description: Migrate a Claude source tree into Codex artifacts: AGENTS.md, .codex/config.toml, .agents/skills, .codex/agents, .codex/hooks.json, plus the migration report.
rules: DESTRUCTIVE: writes and overwrites generated Codex artifacts under TARGET
with MIGRATE_FLAGS=--replace it also deletes orphaned generated skills/subagents
does not edit Claude source files (.claude/, .mcp.json, .claude.json)
pass MIGRATE_FLAGS=--dry-run to preview without writing; --mcp/--skills/--subagents to scope surfaces
usage: Set SOURCE (Claude source root) and TARGET (Codex root). Optional MIGRATE_FLAGS (e.g. --dry-run, --mcp, --skills, --subagents, --replace). Output: migrate.txt.
limitation: Mutates the local Codex target filesystem (declared destructive). The vendored CLI imports tomllib and needs Python 3.11+ to run; on older Python it writes nothing and degrades gracefully. Never deploys to a remote.
